titles.text: Disney's Peter Pan: Return to Neverland

descriptions.text: Players take control of Peter Pan. He can fly with Pixie Dust if he has Tinker Bell, but if he runs out of Pixie Dust, Peter cannot fly. Enemies are in this game, but all can be defeated, except police officers. Enemies can be defeated by any attack, such as ground pounding, throwing his sword or fighting.
